name: sqllens
description: Ask any database questions in plain English. Translates natural language to SQL and runs it. Read-only by default.

database_url.title: Database URL
database_url.description: SQLAlchemy-style DSN. Examples: sqlite:///path/to/db.sqlite, postgresql://user:pw@host:5432/db, mysql+pymysql://user:pw@host:3306/db

database_name.title: Database display name
database_name.description: Human-readable name shown via list_data_sources. Defaults to 'primary'.

read_only.title: Enforce read-only
read_only.description: Reject any non-SELECT SQL the agent generates. Strongly recommended.

anthropic_api_key.title: Anthropic API key
anthropic_api_key.description: Get one at https://console.anthropic.com/. Stored in your OS keychain.

model.title: Anthropic model
model.description: Model id passed to the Anthropic SDK.

memory_dir.title: Memory directory
memory_dir.description: Where the agent's vector memory (ChromaDB) is persisted across sessions.
